metadata.name: GoodTrip [Fixed]
metadata.description:
Teleport to cleared rooms directly from the minimap — now fixed, polished, and highly configurable.
This is a maintained version of [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1630477831]GoodTrip[/url]. You only need to enable GoodTrip [Fixed]; the original mod is not required.
HOW TO USE
- Mouse: hold the map button (TAB by default), then click a room on the minimap. - Keyboard/controller: hold the map button and use the shooting directions to select a room on the teleport map. - Drag the teleport map anywhere you like, or pin it to click rooms without holding TAB. - Both your current room and destination normally need to be cleared, and you cannot teleport during combat.
KEY FIXES
- Fixed Tainted Forgotten throwing his bone when navigating with TAB + ↑↓←→. - Fixed mouse teleportation and map orientation in the Downpour II mirror world. - HUD offset is detected automatically from options.ini. - Fixed compatibility with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1978904635]Minimap API[/url] and Repentance+. - Prevented accidental tear firing when clicking the teleport map. - The teleport map remembers its position between runs.
FEATURES
Configure these features with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3701683951]Mod Config Menu[/url]:
- Bookmark rooms with TAB + 1, TAB + 2, etc.; use the same shortcut again to teleport back (MCM: AllowBookmarking). - Return to the previously visited room with TAB + Z; press it again to return (MCM: LastRoomShortcut). - Restart quickly with TAB + R (MCM: FastRestartEnable). - Controller users can assign alternate buttons for the Z and R shortcuts. - Show special-room icons: the mirror room and white fireplace in Downpour II, minecart and buttons in Mines II, and tinted skull in Depths II (MCM: ShowSpecialIcons). - Teleport into an uncleared room when it has a cleared neighbor (MCM: AllowNeighborRoom). - Optionally ignore Curse of the Lost (MCM: FollowCurseOfLost). - Move quickly to a neighboring room with TAB + WASD (MCM: QuicklyOneRoomMove, off by default). - Move the teleport-map cursor faster with TAB + ↑↓←→ (MCM: FasterCursorMove, off by default). - Remove the black transition animation for faster teleportation (MCM: FastTransition, off by default). - Integrate with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3071704639]Dangerous room! Caution[/url] to color dangerous rooms. - Enable Fair Trip rules, which add time based on movement speed and teleport distance and require a cleared route (MCM: FairTripTime, off by default). Thanks @iamthestoat and @Porp! - Bind a custom keyboard/controller button for the teleport map, useful for avoiding EID's TAB shortcut (MCM: OverlayKey / OverlayKeyController). Thanks @Porp! - Scale the teleport map from 0.5x to 2.5x (MCM: MinimapScale).
FAQ
Accidentally dragged the teleport map into the trash? Restore it from MCM, or enter this command in the in-game console: lua gt:get_config().KeyboardMapEnable=true
Original [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1630477831]GoodTrip[/url] by @tarako Co-authored with @Porp GitHub: https://github.com/archibate/isaacmods
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │★ Check out my other fixed mod: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3169946719]TimeMachine [Fixed][/url] ★│ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
